Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed order that was emailed to the court. Moving party must file a separate proposed form of Judgment. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings (Amended)
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK'S AMENDED MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is Off calendar. Duplicate entry. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Continued to April 29, 2013 to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must immediately deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
